PHI's T2 (Kerkering, Alvarado) is depleted, partially offsetting the bullpen edge, but not enough to reduce my estimate below threshold. All four 3u conditions are met: no starter [sm], no stale prices on the RL market, no movement against my position (ML barely moved), and two independent model components drive the edge.
